description: Query status + logs of a non-existent extension (covers error paths of `neomind extension status` + `extension logs`; no .nep install needed).

turns.user: Show me the runtime status and recent logs for extension ghost-extension.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind extension status ghost-extension` and/or `neomind extension logs ghost-extension` (or equivalent API), and after receiving the not-found error, clearly reports it
expectations.overall: Must actually invoke the tool, and answer based on the error result
